description_long: This warehouse is a low, rectangular structure with a broad, flat roof and minimal exterior detailing. The main body appears to be constructed from a muted, olive-green material, likely metal or concrete panels, with a central strip or entry feature in a contrasting reddish-brown color. The building is set on a flat plane, and its roof is completely flat, lacking any visible skylights, HVAC units, or other rooftop equipment. There are no visible windows, doors, or decorative elements, giving the structure a highly utilitarian and industrial appearance. The overall design is simple and functional, optimized for storage and logistical use. The lack of visible signage or architectural ornamentation reinforces its purpose as a practical storage facility.
description: A low, rectangular warehouse with a flat roof and plain olive-green exterior, featuring a central reddish-brown strip. The design is utilitarian and lacks windows or decorative elements.
description_view_0: The warehouse is seen from a low angle, highlighting its broad, flat roof and the central reddish-brown strip running across the middle.
description_view_1: Viewed from the side, the building appears narrow, with the reddish-brown strip forming a thin vertical line at the center.
description_view_2: This view mirrors the first, showing the flat roof and central strip, but from the opposite side, maintaining the same utilitarian appearance.
description_view_3: From this side angle, the warehouse again appears narrow, with the reddish-brown strip visible as a thin vertical feature.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade is plain and unadorned, constructed from olive-green panels with a single central reddish-brown strip that likely marks an entry or loading area. There are no visible windows, signage, or decorative features, emphasizing a purely functional design.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is completely flat and featureless, with no visible skylights, HVAC units, or other rooftop structures, and appears to be made from the same material as the main building.
